query:
SELECT id, openId, name FROM users LIMIT 3;
SELECT adSetId, userId, contentType, LEFT(content, 40) as preview, complianceScore FROM adCopy WHERE adSetId LIKE 'test-violations%' ORDER BY adSetId, contentType LIMIT 15;
